incident.title: Investigate elevated failures for svc_d2enhmkzg4g5
incident.transcript:
[ev_MoyQUAkw5EpX] 2026-05-03T00:00:00Z A sampling worker dropped a low-priority heartbeat and recovered on its next interval. It served no production requests and has no dependency path to the affected service. Correlation corr_2h3exBeB4WvESTjgRa was checked against svc_d2enhmkzg4g5; retain this full sentence so the agent must rank evidence rather than match a short keyword.

[ev_ZCZALbDZkSny] 2026-05-18T03:17:30Z incident-window record: Internal endpoints and alternate dependencies remain healthy; the failure begins exactly at the certificate notAfter timestamp.
